# Infinite Research Loop

> **Any model is a sparse composition of experts. For any query, only a fraction of the full knowledge matters. Find that fraction at runtime, compose only those experts, generate tokens — huge-model quality at small-model cost, on any hardware.**

Read VISION.md for the frontier. Read .ralph/memories.md for accumulated wisdom.

Your loop never ends — each completed experiment reveals the next question.

```
Scout → Theorist → Builder → Critic → Integrator ... [truncated, 554 chars total]

Exp 3 Procrustes decomposition KILLED: +5.7% vs joint (threshold 5%), worse than concat (-0.2%). Root cause: ReLU nonlinearity prevents clean shared/unique separation. 54% shared knowledge found. Next: Exp 4 (N experts).

Exp 4 N=5 expert scaling PASSED: +1.6% vs joint (threshold 5%), orthogonality holds (cos=0.112 mean, 0.167 max), all 5 domains within 3%, calibration scales linearly (200 steps). Micro arena fully explored. Next: Exp 5 (Beat 1.5B at macro scale).
Exp 4 N=5 scaling reviewed (PROCEED) and integrated. VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, memories updated. Micro arena exhausted — 5 experiments complete. Next: Exp 5 macro scale (0.5B + LoRA vs 1.5B).

Micro arena exhausted. 5 experiments complete: self-routing (killed), contrastive keys (killed), sparse routing (k=1 killed, k=2 validated), Procrustes decomp (killed), N=5 scaling (passed). Validated protocol: softmax router + k=2 sparsity + concatenation + shared attention. Ready for macro transition: 0.5B + LoRA experts vs 1.5B monolithic.
